footer.tagline: AI Swing Analysis — Golf, Tennis, Baseball & Softball
footer.buildingBody: SwingVantage is in active development. If there's anything you can tell us so we can improve, we'd love to hear it.
footer.buildingCtaSuffix: and help shape what we build next.
footer.aiDisclaimerBody: SwingVantage's AI coaching helps identify swing patterns and prioritize practice. It is not a substitute for a qualified professional coach. SwingVantage is not a medical device — consult a sports medicine professional if you experience pain.
footer.privacyLine: Your data is private to you. We do not sell your personal information.

meta.title: SwingVantage — Free AI Swing Analysis for Golf, Tennis, Baseball & Softball
meta.description: Upload a swing video or import launch monitor data. Get a free AI-powered breakdown of your top swing fault, personalized drills, and a practice plan. Supports golf, tennis, baseball, and softball.

hero.titleLine1: One fix. One plan. One retest.
hero.titleLine2: Free swing improvement for golf, baseball & softball
hero.subtitle: SwingVantage is the everyday improvement edge for athletes — and parents of athletes. Upload a swing and get the single fix that matters most, the drills to groove it, and a plan that gets you there.
hero.note: Your first result in about 3 minutes.
hero.noteLine2: No account required. No credit card. Private by default.

how.heading: How SwingVantage Works
how.step1Desc: Select golf, tennis, baseball, or softball. SwingVantage adapts every analysis, drill, and coaching cue to your sport.
how.step2Desc: Upload a swing video, import launch monitor CSV data, or snap a photo of your performance table.
how.step3Desc: SwingVantage's diagnostic engine identifies your highest-priority swing issue with severity, evidence, and likely causes.
how.step4Desc: Receive targeted drills, YouTube search links, and a next-session focus based on your actual swing data.

why.heading: Why Athletes Choose SwingVantage
why.item1Desc: Instead of a list of 20 things to fix, SwingVantage identifies the single highest-impact issue to work on first.
why.item2Desc: Every recommended drill is tied to the specific issue detected — not generic advice.
why.item3Desc: Video analysis runs locally when possible. Your swing data is never shared publicly by default.

home.disclaimer: SwingVantage is your AI-powered improvement edge — confident, data-backed coaching you can use every day. Findings are heuristic estimates — smart reads that sharpen with every swing you add. For injury concerns or advanced competitive development, loop in a qualified coach, and keep young athletes supervised during practice.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: SwingVantage is a free, AI-powered swing analysis platform for golf, tennis, baseball, and softball. Upload a swing video or import launch-monitor data and it gives you a clear read on your highest-impact swing fault, sport-specific drills, and a practice plan — a smarter vantage point on your swing, without expensive private coaching.
faq.a2: Yes. SwingVantage's full analysis, drill recommendations, and progress tracking are free. No credit card required.
faq.q3: Do I need to create an account?
faq.a3: No — you can start instantly with no account, and your data is saved privately on your device. Create a free account anytime to sync it securely across your devices, or use Backup & Restore to move it yourself. Your swing videos stay private either way.
faq.a4: Golf, tennis, baseball, slow pitch softball, and fast pitch softball — each with its own sport-specific diagnostic engine.
faq.a5: SwingVantage is your everyday improvement edge — it pinpoints the single highest-impact fix in your swing and hands you the drills and plan to groove it, no appointment needed. For injury concerns or advanced technique work it pairs perfectly with a qualified coach, and you will show up to those sessions already ahead.
faq.a6: Yes. Video analysis runs in your browser. Videos are not shared publicly by default.

finalCta.heading: Start Improving Your Swing Today
finalCta.subtitle: Free AI analysis for golf, tennis, baseball, and softball. No account needed.
